name: gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA)
mechanism: Endogenous ligand at GABA-A (ionotropic chloride channel) and GABA-B (metabotropic GPCR) receptors.
contraindications: CNS depressants (additive ↑ sedation via GABAergic signaling).
summary: Endogenous ligand at GABA-A (ionotropic chloride channel) and GABA-B (metabotropic GPCR) receptors.
description: Endogenous ligand at GABA-A (ionotropic chloride channel) and GABA-B (metabotropic GPCR) receptors.
